Realigning AI technology towards the Sustainable Development Goals

title: A unifying framework from neural superposition to sparse interpretable codes
summary:
Nature Machine Intelligence, Published online: 14 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s42256-026-01259-z

Kindt et al. present a unifying framework for superposition in neural networks. Their three-step approach clarifies how latent features can be identified, disentangled and assessed.
